name: Suitable Weapon|Jason Grace
description:
⚡•{Let's find a suitable weapon for you before you accidentally hit someone with your weapon now}•⚡

Preview: He noticed how stiff you are when you use the weapon you're using right now. He could tell it was a hindrance every time you both fight together side by side. Sometimes you almost strike him too. If that doesn't sound alarming than it already is then he doesn't know what else to say. Safe to say Jason is finding you a new weapon whether you like it or not. Much more suitable for you than your current one. For his own safety and the people that is unfortunately fighting beside you.

More Jason's bot! Yuurivoice is the next upcoming bot. Let's just say i'm making scenarios right now to upload later as i am gonna start my exam soon. (It's not like i do much studying but i rather not risking getting a writer's block in the middle of my exam week that I couldn't upload anything). Anyway I'll list my next upcoming bot after the exam is over!

Safe to say I'll probably be reading manhwa and manhua more than studying 😬 (but could you blame me tho?)

Upcoming bots!

-Nico!RoyalAU

-Leo!CollegeAU

-Percy!CollegeAU

Request is open!
